title: Settings
commandsPinnedHint: Pinned commands are prioritized before MRU in command palettes

workspace_mode_enjoy_toggle.label: Toggle Enjoy Mode
workspace_mode_enjoy_toggle.description: Toggle workspace between editor and enjoy

workspace_mode_git.label: Switch To Source Control
workspace_mode_git.description: Switch workspace mode to git source control

settings_playback_progress_bar_toggle.label: Toggle Playback Progress Bar
settings_playback_progress_bar_toggle.description: Show or hide playback progress bar

settings_playback_sync_scroll_toggle.label: Toggle Sync Scroll
settings_playback_sync_scroll_toggle.description: Enable or disable editor sync scroll

settings_playback_cursor_broadcast_toggl.label: Toggle Cursor Broadcast
settings_playback_cursor_broadcast_toggl.description: Enable or disable editor cursor broadcast

settings_playback_component_staff_contro.label: Toggle Staff Controls
settings_playback_component_staff_contro.description: Show or hide staff controls component

settings_playback_component_tracks_contr.label: Toggle Tracks Controls
settings_playback_component_tracks_contr.description: Show or hide tracks controls component

settings_playback_component_zoom_control.label: Toggle Zoom Controls
settings_playback_component_zoom_control.description: Show or hide zoom controls component

settings_playback_component_speed_contro.label: Toggle Speed Controls
settings_playback_component_speed_contro.description: Show or hide playback speed controls component

settings_playback_component_progress_con.label: Toggle Progress Controls
settings_playback_component_progress_con.description: Show or hide playback progress controls component

settings_playback_component_transport_co.label: Toggle Transport Controls
settings_playback_component_transport_co.description: Show or hide playback transport controls component

aboutTagline1: Tabst. Write guitar tabs like markdown.
aboutTagline2: Efficiently write alphaTex, play scores, and share PDF/GP.
alphatabCaptionLine1: Tabst is inspired and powered by alphaTab.js

appearanceSection.title: Appearance
appearanceSection.themeHint: Theme is controlled by page class
appearanceSection.followSystemDescription: Automatically switch between light and dark themes based on system settings

playbackSection.playbackProgressBarHint: Show playback timeline and current progress in the bottom toolbar
playbackSection.playbackProgressSeekHint: Allow dragging the progress bar to jump playback position
playbackSection.syncScrollHint: Auto-scroll editor to follow current note during playback
playbackSection.cursorBroadcastHint: Sync editor cursor bar position to Preview display
playbackSection.customPlayerHint: Configure which player controls to show and their order

playerConfigurator.dragToReorder: Press enter or space to toggle, drag to reorder {{component}}
playerConfigurator.hint: Drag to reorder • Toggle checkbox to show/hide controls
playerConfigurator.playbackProgressDesc: Show current progress and support draggable seek
playerConfigurator.playbackTransportDesc: Play, pause, stop, and refresh buttons
